description: FirstEnergy is an Akron-based regulated electric utility holding company serving more than 6 million customers across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic through local distribution, transmission and regulated generation assets.

overview.title: Business Footprint
paragraphs: FirstEnergy is a large investor-owned electric utility focused on regulated power delivery across Ohio, Pennsylvania, New Jersey, West Virginia, Maryland and New York. Its business is the unglamorous but critical layer of electricity infrastructure: poles, wires, substations, meters, outage response and the monthly bill that reminds everyone the grid is not optional.

overview.title: Operating Companies
paragraphs: The company reaches customers through local utility brands including Ohio Edison, The Illuminating Company, Toledo Edison, Jersey Central Power & Light, Mon Power and Potomac Edison. Its Pennsylvania utility brands, Met-Ed, Penelec, Penn Power and West Penn Power, were consolidated into FirstEnergy Pennsylvania on January 1, 2024 while remaining important customer-facing names.

overview.title: Infrastructure and Generation
paragraphs: FirstEnergy reports more than 269,000 miles of distribution lines and roughly 24,000 miles of transmission lines connecting Midwest and Mid-Atlantic markets. It also controls about 3,599 megawatts of regulated generation, primarily scrubbed coal plus hydro and solar assets in West Virginia and Virginia.

overview.title: Modernization and Oversight
paragraphs: The company’s Energize365 program plans $26 billion of transmission and distribution investment from 2024 through 2028, including grid automation, resiliency work, renewable interconnection support and smart-meter deployment expected to reach about 86% of customers by 2028.

Because FirstEnergy is a regulated utility, many strategic claims eventually become rate cases, FERC filings or state docket entries. Its recent governance history, including Ohio House Bill 6-related investigations, makes primary-source regulatory and SEC materials especially important for any public-interest registry entry.
